translation-target: Select the translation target to Auto-Translate

transliteration.should-be-different: Source and target scripts must be different

gemini-api: Please enter the Gemini API Key
libre-translate-url: Enter the valid Libre Translate Server URL

llama.endpoint: Please enter the Llama AI endpoint
llama.model: Please enter the Llama AI model

paths.base: Please enter the path of the base language file
paths.target: Please enter the path of the translation

file-type: Choose the file type of the new translation

search.query: Please enter the query to find

replace.from: Please enter the translation to replace

batch-rename.from: Please enter the key to rename
batch-rename.to: Please enter the new key name

spell-check.scope: Select the scope for a spell check

term.required: Please add the term on the base language

add-to-glossary.part-of-speech: Please add the part of speech to the term

translation.required: Please add the translation of this term

no-active-search: Currently there are no active search instances
different-formats: Target format should match the Base language format
format-not-found: The requested format is not found
target-empty: Target Path is empty. Save cancelled
fetch-lang-error: Failed to fetch the languages list
no-base-target: Base and target languages are required
